# Chih-Hao Tsai's Technology Page

## Overview

This website presents computing and programming works I have done in the past eight years. The majority of them are pertinent to Chinese computing, which reflects my research interest. The remaining two pages discuss about high-precision timing techniques. I had been interested in those techniques because virtually every cognitive psychology experiment requires a millisecond resolution timer.

## Questions or Comments?

If you have any question or comment regarding my computing and programming works, feel free to send me an email (). I will try to get back to you as soon as possible if my time and resource permit.
